title: BEL Valves Sets its Sights on Hydrogen and Carbon Capture Markets
content: BEL Valves has launched a new hydrogen and carbon capture department, aimed at positioning the Company at the forefront of the clean energy sector. The department is headed by Business Development Director, Steve Carty, and will see BEL Valves develop oil and gas valves to ensure they are suitable for the hydrogen and carbon capture markets.
author: Analysts Account
